name: @rwa-tokenized-compliance-system/evm
description: Foundry contracts for regulated RWA security tokens — legacy registry and ERC-3643 / T-REX.

scripts.deploy:sepolia: mkdir -p deployments && forge script script/deploy/DeployTREX.s.sol:DeployTREX --rpc-url ${SEPOLIA_RPC_URL} --broadcast && node scripts/write-backend-env.mjs
scripts.deploy:sepolia:legacy: mkdir -p deployments && forge script script/deploy/DeployCore.s.sol:DeployCore --rpc-url ${SEPOLIA_RPC_URL} --broadcast --verify && node scripts/write-backend-env.mjs
